text: Present list The checklist manifesto - Atul gawande The little black book of maintenance excellence - Daniel T Nespresso coffee pods full bodied (suitable for short macs & espresso) Modern renaissance eyeshadow palette from anastasia Beverly hills magnetic lashes (full length natural, 3 magnets per lashes, some only have 2 magnets) Diva curls products - Wave Maker, Ultra Defining Gel, One Condition Delight, Low Poo Delight (written in order of preference) Hand held steam iron Earphones for work (the hairdryer shaped earpieces or the type that hook onto the ears (most preferred) , regular earphones fall out of my ear as | am missing half the cartilage) good sound quality Cue or Veronica Maine gift card
